title: Censored
body:
**Censored** is a lightweight yet highly effective chat filtering plugin for Spigot and Paper servers. It automatically detects and censors offensive and inappropriate words in player messages, even when players try to bypass detection with symbols, numbers, or spacing tricks.

**Features**
- **Multilingual support.** Includes swear lists for: English, Polish, Russian, German and Custom (editable list)
- **Smart detection.** Detects swears with symbols and leetspeak like: r3ally b4d w0rd
- **LuckPerms Chat Formatter support.** Automatically applies group-based chat formats with placeholders, prefixes, suffixes, and custom colors (optional)
- **PlaceholderAPI integration.** Full support for PlaceholderAPI placeholders inside chat formats
- **Customizable configuration.** Easily add, remove or edit banned words via file or command
- **Lightweight and efficient.** Minimal performance impact, runs smoothly with metrics support (bStats)
- **Plug and play.** Automatically creates and loads swear lists on first run. No manual setup required

**Commands:**
- ```/censored toggle``` Enable or disable the chat filter
- ```/censored reload``` Reload all word lists without restarting the server
- ```/censored add <word>``` Add a new word to the custom list
- ```/censored remove <word>``` Remove a word to the custom list
- ```/report <player> <reason>``` Report a player for something bad
- ```/reportlogs``` Show all the reports

**Permissions:**
- **censored.admin** Allows access to all ```/censored``` commands
- **censored.bypass** Bypasses chat filter

**Things i want to add:**
- **Punishment System** Warning counter and configurable punishments
- **Censor stats** Show how many words have been censored today, top offenders, etc.
